mapper.select: SELECT TRG_KUBUN ,TRG_ID ,TRG_NM ,SRC_KUBUN ,SRC_ID ,SRC_NM ,REL_NM ,SP_YN FROM V_LNK_ACT_INFO WHERE SRC_ID = #{AML_CUST_ID} UNION ALL SELECT TRG_KUBUN ,TRG_ID ,TRG_NM ,SRC_KUBUN ,SRC_ID ,SRC_NM ,REL_NM ,SP_YN FROM V_LNK_TRN_INFO WHERE SRC_KUBUN='P' AND SRC_ID = #{AML_CUST_ID} AND DL_DT BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND (#{allOpen} != 'Y' OR SP_YN='Y')

SELECT SRC_KUBUN AS TRG_KUBUN ,SRC_ID AS TRG_ID ,SRC_NM AS TRG_NM ,TRG_KUBUN AS SRC_KUBUN ,TRG_ID AS SRC_ID ,TRG_NM AS SRC_NM ,REL_NM ,SP_YN FROM V_LNK_ACT_INFO WHERE TRG_ID = #{TRG_ID} AND GNL_AC_NO = #{TRG_ID} UNION ALL SELECT TRG_KUBUN ,TRG_ID ,TRG_NM ,SRC_KUBUN ,SRC_ID ,SRC_NM ,REL_NM ,SP_YN FROM V_LNK_TRN_INFO WHERE SRC_ID=#{TRG_ID} AND DL_DT BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND (#{allOpen}='N' OR SP_YN='Y') AND GNL_AC_NO=#{TRG_ID}
AND REPLACE(SUBSTR(TRG_NM, INSTR(TRG_NM,CHR(10))+1 ), ',', '') > #{MIN_AMT}
SELECT NVL(MAX(INDV_CORP_CCD), COUNT(*)) AS INDV_CORP_CCD FROM NIC01B WHERE AML_CUST_ID = (SELECT NVL(MAX(AML_CUST_ID), COUNT(*)) FROM NIC17B WHERE GNL_AC_NO = #{TRG_ID} )

SELECT GNL_AC_NO AS GNL_AC_NO ,GET_CODE_NAME('M035',AC_ST_CCD) AS AC_ST_CCD ,AC_OPN_DT AS AC_OPN_DT ,GDS_NO AS GDS_NO ,FNL_DL_DT AS FNL_DL_DT ,ACDT_F AS ACDT_F ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT',CLSD_BRN_CD,'') AS CLSD_BRN_CD ,CLSD_DT AS CLSD_DT FROM NIC17B WHERE GNL_AC_NO = #{param0}

SELECT A.GNL_AC_NO AS GNL_AC_NO ,'[' || A.GDS_NO || ']' || GET_CODE_NAME('M034',A.GDS_NO) AS GDS_NO ,A.DL_DT AS DL_DT ,A.DL_SQ AS DL_SQ ,GET_CODE_NAME('M046',A.DL_WY_CD) AS DL_WY_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M044',A.DL_CHNNL_CD) AS DL_CHNNL_CD ,A.SMRY_TYP_CD AS SMRY_TYP_CD ,A.DL_TM AS DL_TM ,A.DL_AMT AS DL_AMT ,A.CHCK_AMT AS CHCK_AMT ,A.CSH AS CSH ,A.TFND_RA AS TFND_RA ,A.CRNCY_CD AS CRNCY_CD ,A.I_AMT_P_NM AS I_AMT_P_NM ,A.I_AMT_P_RNM_NO AS I_AMT_P_RNM_NO ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002',TRIM(A.I_AMT_P_RNM_NO_CCD) ) AS I_AMT_P_RNM_NO_CCD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M045',A.DL_TYP_CD) AS DL_TYP_CD ,B.CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD AS CPRTY_TRSNS_OGN_CD ,B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NO ,B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_NM ,GET_CODE_NAME('M004',TRIM(B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_NTN_CD) ) AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_OWN_NTN_CD ,GET_CODE_NAME('M002',TRIM(B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD) ) AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_CNFR_CCD ,B.CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_NO AS CPRTY_TRSNS_AC_RNM_NO FROM NIC61B A LEFT OUTER JOIN NIC62B B ON A.GNL_AC_NO = B.GNL_AC_NO AND A.GDS_NO = B.GDS_NO AND A.DL_DT = B.DL_DT AND A.DL_SQ = B.DL_SQ WHERE A.GNL_AC_NO = #{param0} AND A.GDS_NO = #{param1} AND A.DL_DT = #{param2} AND A.DL_SQ = #{param3}

SELECT GET_CODE_NAME('M002',A.RNM_CNFR_CCD) AS RNM_CNFR_NM -- 실명구분 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M034',B.GDS_NO) AS GDS_NM -- 상품종류 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('AC',B.GNL_AC_NO,'') AS GNL_AC_NO -- 계좌번호 ,(SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = B.OPN_BRN_CD) AS GDS_OPN_BRN_NM -- 계좌개설지점 ,(SELECT DPRT_NM FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = B.MN_DL_DPRT_CD) AS MN_DL_DPRT_NM -- 주거래지점 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT',B.DCH_GDS_DT,'') AS DCH_GDS_DT -- 계좌개설일자 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT',C.DL_DT,'') AS DL_DT -- 거래일자 ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DT',C.DL_TM,'') AS DL_TM -- 거래시간 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M044',C.DL_CHNNL_CD) AS DL_CHNNL_NM -- 거래채널 ,GET_CODE_NAME('M046',DL_WY_CD) AS DL_WY_NM -- 거래수단 ,C.DL_AMT -- 거래금액 ,C.CSH -- 현금 ,C.CHCK_AMT -- 수표 FROM NIC01B A ,NIC17B B ,NIC61B C WHERE A.AML_CUST_ID = B.AML_CUST_ID AND B.GNL_AC_NO = C.GNL_AC_NO AND B.GDS_NO = C.GDS_NO AND A.AML_CUST_ID = #{param0} -- 파라미터 : 실명확인번호 AND C.DL_DT BETWEEN #{param1} AND #{param2} ORDER BY B.GDS_TYP_CD ,B.GNL_AC_NO ,B.GDS_NO ,C.DL_DT ,C.DL_TM
